channel.title: Misc on Tzion
channel.description: Recent content in Misc on Tzion

item.title: [NAHAMCONCTF] WhenAmI
item.description: Task source: https://github.com/Tzion0/CTF/tree/master/NahamConCTF/2022/Miscellaneous/WhenAmI Description I know where I am, but… when am I? This challenge provided a txt file. Content of txt file: When am I?? So, I look down at my watch. It's December 28, 2011 at 11:59AM, and I'm just minding my own business at -13.582075733990298, -172.5084838587106. I hung out there until the local time was 1:00AM on December 31st, and then I hopped on a plane and took a 1 hour flight over to -14.
